misc: Rarely seen on the course without a drink in his hand
biography: Martin, a familiar face at St. Laurence Golf, is known as much for his spirited play as he is for the ever-present drink in his hand. His jovial demeanor off the course belies a fierce competitor once he steps onto the tee box.

With 10 past appearances at the Hector Trophée, Martin's experience is undeniable. He has secured the coveted Hector Trophée once, and has also distinguished himself as the best individual player when he claimed the Victor Trophy. His familiarity with the nuances of the game and the course makes him a formidable opponent.
As Martin prepares for his 11th appearance at the Hector Trophée in 2026, anticipation builds around whether he can leverage his experience and lift the trophy once again.
